title: astragalus greuteri
intro: Astragalus greuteri, also known as the Alpine milk-vetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant is rich in saponins and flavonoids, which contribute to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. Astragalus greuteri is believed to have various health benefits, including boosting the immune system, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the roots and stems of this plant are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
